title: HEAD TEACHER'S MESSAGE
name: MUSOKE GODFREY
message_preview: I am very pleased to write an article about Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School - Mengo on this website.  I thank you very much indeed for the support you rendered to this school.  I highly treasure the contribution you make towards the faster growth of this mighty school. Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School – Mengo
image_alt: Portrait of Head Teacher MUSOKE GODFREY
